prompt.prompt: See prompt.md — paste your customized prompt here

agent.first_message: Hi there, thanks for taking the time. I'm calling from [Company] — we'd love to get your quick feedback on your recent experience. It'll only take a couple of minutes. Shall we go ahead?

tools.name: end_call
tools.description: End the call after the survey is completed, the respondent declines to participate, or the respondent asks to stop.

evaluation_criteria.name: Survey Completed
evaluation_criteria.description: The respondent answered all survey questions (or the agent recorded skips for declined questions).

evaluation_criteria.name: All Questions Asked
evaluation_criteria.description: The agent asked every question in the survey in the correct order.

evaluation_criteria.name: Respondent Comfortable
evaluation_criteria.description: The agent maintained a comfortable pace and did not pressure the respondent on any question.

respondent_name.description: Name of the person who took the survey

q1_rating.description: Rating for question 1 on a scale of 1 to 5

q2_rating.description: Rating for question 2 on a scale of 1 to 5

q3_rating.description: Rating for question 3 on a scale of 1 to 5

overall_satisfaction.description: Overall satisfaction level expressed by the respondent

additional_comments.description: Any additional comments or suggestions the respondent offered
